case_title: O' SULLIVAN, MAUREEN PH.D. C/O PSYCHOLOGY DEPT.USF VS LAHREN, THEODORE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LAHREN, THEODORE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT O' SULLIVAN, MAUREEN PH.D. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
